product.name: ArWoWear T6 Chem Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
product.titleDescriptor: 60% Cotton 40% Polyester, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 200 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 200 g/m², 60% Cotton 40% Polyester, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 2/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T6 Chem Pro is 200 g/m², vat dyed, 60% cotton 40% polyester merserized workwear fabric with ultra comfort.
Water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function.
It is resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
60% Cotton 40% Polyester, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 200 gr/m'2
200 g/m², 60% Cotton 40% Polyester, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 2/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Has 'emi' property (EMI-related), but no explicit statement connecting it to electrical utilities, arc protection or high-voltage work; this is generic chemical-resistant workwear.

stage1.noMatchReason: This product is explicitly positioned as a chemical-resistant workwear fabric for coveralls (EN ISO 13034), vat dyed cotton/polyester twill with water/oil repellency. No explicit military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hi-vis, medical, sport, architecture-building or transport use is stated in the supplied data.

evidence: categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
It is resistant to most industrial chemicals.
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly positioned as a chemical-resistant workwear fabric for coveralls, tested to EN ISO 13034, which fits general industrial protective apparel without a narrower named sector (e.g., firefighting, welding, energy) being explicitly stated.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary use is explicitly stated; the EMI property alone is insufficient to justify the energy sector per rule 8, and no other named sector is supported.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Only 'emi' property listed with no explicit connection to electrical utilities or high-voltage work, per rule 8.
Chemical resistance and FR-like properties are present but no welding/metallurgy use is explicitly stated.
No explicit firefighting/turnout gear use stated; chemical resistance alone is insufficient.
